title: Change logo background from mosaic/white to bluish

requirements.text: Change the logo background in the Header component from the current mosaic/white style to a bluish color. Replace any white, light, or mosaic-patterned background behind the logo with a deep or medium blue tone (e.g., a solid or subtle gradient blue such as #1a3a6b or a cosmic blue hue) that complements the existing dark cosmic theme of the app.

quotes: Can u change the background of logo from mosaic write to bluish something

acceptanceCriteria: The logo area in the Header no longer has a white or mosaic-patterned background.
The logo background is visibly bluish and harmonizes with the dark cosmic theme.
The logo image and text remain clearly visible against the new blue background.
The change is consistent across desktop and mobile views.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui (immutable paths).
The new blue background must remain consistent with the existing dark cosmic theme.
nonGoals: Changing any other part of the Header layout or navigation.
Changing backgrounds on any other page or component.
